---
title: "About"
---

I'm a third-year statistics and data science student at UC Santa Barbara,
aiming at a meaningful career in biostatistics.

## What I work on

My coursework has run through the probability and stochastic processes
sequence, regression and GLMs, and statistical machine learning. Right now
I'm doing some personal study into epidemiology and strengthening my R skills.

This summer I'm part of ISI-BUDS, an NIH-funded biostatistics research
program at UC Irvine, learning by working on real questions alongside faculty 
and grad students.

## Elsewhere

Big fan of Padres baseball, general NBA, working out, and modern jazz :)

You can reach me at noahpearl@ucsb.edu, or grab my [CV](cv.pdf).
